description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, featuring clean lines and a boxy structure. The front facade includes a large garage door, a balcony with outdoor seating, and a prominent palm tree and deciduous tree integrated into the landscaping. The upper floor has expansive windows, allowing for ample natural light, while the lower floor is more enclosed for privacy. The rear and side views reveal a rooftop terrace and additional outdoor living spaces, with the trees providing shade and visual interest. The exterior appears to be finished in light-colored materials, likely concrete or stucco, with some wooden or metal accents. The overall design emphasizes open, functional spaces and a strong connection to the outdoors.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a garage, and integrated landscaping featuring a palm and deciduous tree. The design is minimalist with outdoor terraces and a light exterior finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the garage, balcony with seating, palm tree, and main entryway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, rooftop terrace, and central tree feature.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the enclosed back, rooftop terrace, and tree integration.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with terrace, palm tree, and clear view of the flat roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door, no steps, integrated into a minimalist facade with a balcony above and landscaping elements.
